A REALM OF PERPETUAL WAR

BEYOND RTS
CONQUEST

BATTLE
Same keyboard, two players
Room code or random matchmaking
30 HP bases, no workers, pure combat
Hold 3 zones to bleed the enemy base
Alternate bans (2 each), then pick 1
Single-elimination bracket, 2–10 players
SOLO
Quick match vs AI
Fight all factions in order, unlock as you go
Endless waves, escalating difficulty
24 fights, HP carries over, difficulty ramps
SPECTATE
Pick both sides and watch
EXTRAS
~5 min guided walkthrough
Skill trees and per-faction perks
Rebind keys and direct-spawn hotkeys

LOOKS LIKE YOU'RE NEW HERE
Beyond RTS Conquest is a two-player keyboard RTS with 24 factions, upgrades, and a mid-zone economy. The tutorial takes about 5 minutes and covers everything you need to know.
⚡
SUDDEN DEATH
